message:
fix: return cleanup errors from HandleMerged instead of swallowing them (gt-twy74)

AutoNukeIfClean errors were logged to output but always returned nil,
causing callers to log success when cleanup actually failed. This led to
orphaned worktrees accumulating. Now returns the error so callers can
detect and handle cleanup failures appropriately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
